'''Ashash''' was a [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld]]<ref name="Battle" /> located in the [[Ashash system/Legends|Ashash system]], a part of the [[Zarracina sector/Legends|Zarracina sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Trailing Sectors" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Gas-emitting creature|creature]] that could emit a harmful [[Gas/Legends|gas]] from its body—an aspect in which the creature was similar to the [[stinkfish]] of the<ref name="Battle" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC Sedri">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Sedri system/Legends|Sedri system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]].<ref name="Battle" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ashash was mentioned in ''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]'', a [[1988]] [[roleplaying game]] authored by [[Douglas Kaufman]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Battle" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ashash [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world Ashash, in grid square N-14.<ref name="EAOC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]'' {{1stm}}
